MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-11-2006 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-11-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: GARY W. SULLIVAN FOR PLAINTIFF WHITE OAK INVESTMENT WITH JOHN DOHERTY, GENERAL PARTNER
LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION BY CESAR ALEGRIA FOR DEFENDANT ALLAN C. MARSHALL

THIS CAUSE COMES ON REGULARLY FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE THIS DAY. ALL PARTIES ARE PRESENT AS NOTED ABOVE. SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS ARE HELD. CASE SETTLED. COUNSEL PUT TERMS OF SETTLEMENT ON THE RECORD:
JUDGMENT IS TO BE ENTERED AGAINST DEFENDANT FOR RESTITUTION AND POSSESION OF PROPERTY LOCATED AT 90 6TH AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94118, PLAINTIFF WILL PAY DEFENDANT THE SUM OF $750.00 BY
5:00PM, JANUARY 13, 2006 UPON RETURN OF ALL KEYS TO PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT AGREES TO GIVE UP ALL RIGHTS TO THE PREMISES. ANY PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT AT THE PREMISES WILL BE CONSIDERED ABANDONED AND MAY BE DISPOSED IMMEDIATELY BY PLAINTIFF. EACH PARTY BEARS THEIR OWN COSTS. PAYMENT OF $750.00 IN CASHIERS CHECK WILL BE MADE AT 1740 MARCO POLO WAY, BURLINGAME, CA. IF PLAINTIFF PAYS DEFENDANT AND KEYS ARE RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF BY 5:00PM, JANUARY 13, 2006 , JUDGMENT WILL NOT BE ENTERED. DEFENDANT SHALL SIGN A DOCUMENT UPON RECEIPT OF THE PAYMENT. CASE IS TO BE DISMISSED 5 DAYS AFTER DEFENDANT VACATES THE PREMISES AND KEYS ARE RETURNED.
PARTIES UNDERSTAND AND CONCUR WITH STIPULATION STATED FOR THE RECORD.

JUDGE PRO TEM: ROD THOMPSON; CLERK CLARK BANAYAD; REPORTER TINA PAXTON (218)

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
